tracks.meaning: large quantity or volume of something, especially when sold or transported together
goods or cargo stored or transported in large undivided quantities
the main mass or body of something, distinct from its parts or appendages
to increase in size, volume, or quantity in a sudden or significant way
relating to the sale or purchase of goods in large quantities at reduced prices
to transfer data in large continuous blocks rather than in smaller increments
the body or physique of a person, especially when muscular or well-developed
the flow or movement of something in large quantities through a space or container
a quantity of material or substance considered as a whole rather than in separate parts
